message:
refactor(mcp): replace raw SqliteStorage with OpenStorageResult pipeline

BeadsState no longer stores db_path/issue_prefix. Instead stores
beads_dir, actor, and CliOverrides. New open_storage_ctx() returns
full OpenStorageResult enabling no-db mode and proper config resolution.

- issue_prefix() resolves through merged config layer (project > DB)
- persist_mcp_mutation() calls flush_no_db_if_dirty + auto_flush
- All mutation handlers call persist after writes for no-db JSONL support
- All prompt/resource handlers use open_storage_ctx()
- Server name uses BIN_NAME constant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
